title: midi.out

flags.name: -font <symbol>
flags.description: default 'dejavu sans mono' or 'menlo' for mac

body: [midi.in] sends MIDI data from "cooked" data, instead of "raw" data like [midiout]. It takes data type symbol, values and channel (but a note output is received as a simple numeric list). It outputs raw MIDI data but it also sends out to the connected MIDI device.
